tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set n int #1)
(set pad_len int (sub n (len s)))
(if (le pad_len 0)
  (println s)
  (else
    (set half_pad_len int (div pad_len 2))
    (set left_pad string (repeat " " half_pad_len))
    (set right_pad_len int (sub pad_len half_pad_len))
    (if (eq (mod pad_len 2) 1)
      (set right_pad string (repeat " " (add right_pad_len 1)))
      (else
        (set right_pad string (repeat " " right_pad_len))))
    (println (string_concat left_pad (string_concat s right_pad)))))

      (set line (string_concat line w))
      (else

        (set line w))))
  (if (and (gt (len w) 0) (eq (last line) " ")) (set line (slice line 0 -1)))

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set words array (split s " "))
(set result string "")
(for-each w string words
  (set chars array (chars w))
  (if (gt (len chars) 0)
    (set first_code int (string_get w 0))
    (set rest string (join (slice chars 1) ""))
    (set upper_first string (char_from_code (bit_and first_code 255)))
    (set lower_rest string (lower rest))
    (set result (string_concat result (string_concat upper_first lower_rest)))))
(println (string_concat result "\n"))
tasks.b_code:
(set s string $0)
(set words array (split s " "))
(set result string "")
(for-each w string words
  (set first char (first (chars w)))
  (set rest string (lower (slice w 1)))
  (set uc_first string (upper first))
  (if (eq result "") (set result (fmt "{}{}" uc_first rest))
    (else (set result (fmt "{} {}{}" result uc_first rest)))))
(println (fmt "{}\n" result))

(set n int (arg_int 0))
(set lo int 0)
(set hi int n)
(while (lt lo (add hi 1))
  (set mid int (div (add lo hi) 2))
  (set sq int (mul mid mid))
  (cond
    ((gt sq n) (set hi (sub mid 1)))
    (true (set lo (add mid 1)))))
(println (sub lo 1))
tasks.b_code:

(set hi int n)

  (set mid int (div (add lo hi) 2))

  (if (le sq n)
    (set lo (add mid 1))
    (else (set hi mid))))
(println (sub lo 1))

tasks.a_code:
(fn is_prime n int -> bool
  (if (le n 1) (ret false))
  (set i 2)
  (while (and (lt i n) (gt (mul i i) n))
    (if (eq (mod n i) 0) (ret false))
    (set i (add i 1)))
  (ret true))

(set n int #0)
(set count int 0)
(set num int 2)
(while (lt count n)
  (if (is_prime num)
    (println num)
    (set count (add count 1)))
  (set num (add num 1)))
tasks.b_code:
(fn is_prime n int -> bool
  (if (le n 1) (ret false))
  (set limit int (add (floor (sqrt (cast_int_float n))) 1))
  (for i 2 limit
    (if (eq (mod n i) 0)
      (ret false)))
  (ret true))

(set n #0)
(set count int 0)
(set num int 2)
(while (lt count n)
  (if (is_prime num)
    (println num)
    (set count (add count 1)))
  (set num (add num 1)))
